programmes.show_description: Refresh your wardrobe with Denim & Co's spring fashion. Discover stylish, easy-to-wear pieces perfect for the season's fresh start.
Fall in love with Osprey London's leather goods in this show, from beautiful bags to wow-worthy wallets. Perfect gifts for loved ones or yourself, you're sure to discover something you'll adore.
Elevate your style with Ruth Langsford's chic fashion collection. From classic jeans to vibrant prints, find the perfect pieces to boost your fashion confidence.
Step into Style with Sam
Update your wardrobe for the new year with gorgeous Wynne Layers fashion from MarlaWynne, featuring layering pieces, scarves and more to help give every outfit the perfect finishing touch.
Join us to see Denim & Co's clothing range offering trend-focused pieces combined with timeless style and chic choices for your smart or casual looks.
Designed and made in London, this range of couture fashion jewellery by the renowned Simon Wilson includes larger-than-life crystal-set pieces.

Unveil your chic side with Sosandar! Discover flattering, trendy designs created for real life with longer lengths and unique styles to make you feel sexy, feminine, and confident.
Introducing Fire Light Lab Grown Diamonds, boasting the same physical, optical and chemical properties as a natural mined diamond, but at a more affordable price.

Founded in Penzance, Cornwall in 1981, Seasalt offer high quality, functional and timelessly styling clothing to complement your wardrobe throughout the year.
Join designer Kim Mendelson as she presents her latest lines. Daytime chic to evening sophistication, weekend comfort to party glamour, the Kim & Co collection is designed for every aspect of life.

Specialising in mature plants for instant impact, Plants2Gardens offer a huge array of vibrant, colourful blooms to help transform your outdoor space and bring your garden to life.

Let your garden light up with a little help from this show, offering plenty of ways to get your outdoor space glowing. Illuminate your path or dot your garden with pretty lights, showcased right here.
